description_long: This object consists of a group of three polygonal, faceted pots with a matte, light brown finish, the largest of which contains a leafy green plant. The plant features elongated, lance-shaped leaves with prominent yellow-green variegation and visible veins, radiating outward from thin stems. The pots have a geometric, hexagonal opening and subtle surface shading that suggests a ceramic or stoneware material. The two smaller pots are empty and positioned closely beside the main, planted pot, creating a clustered arrangement. The pots show no visible decorative motifs beyond their faceted structure, and the plant appears healthy and vibrant. There are no visible labels, tags, or additional adornments on the pots or plant.
description: A cluster of three faceted, matte brown pots, one containing a lush, variegated green plant with elongated leaves. The arrangement is simple and geometric, with no visible decoration or labels.
description_view_0: The main, planted pot is prominent, with the leafy plant's variegated leaves fanning forward and partially obscuring the pot's opening.
description_view_1: All three pots are visible, with the plant's leaves arching over the largest pot and the two smaller, empty pots clearly shown to the right.
description_view_2: The cluster is seen from above and behind, highlighting the hexagonal openings of all three pots and the upward reach of the plant's leaves.
description_view_3: The arrangement is viewed from the side, with the two smaller pots to the left and the planted pot's faceted body and leaf spread clearly visible.
